title: alsophila camerooniana
intro: Alsophila camerooniana, also known as the Cameroon tree fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the family Cyatheaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Cameroon and other parts of central Africa, where it grows up to 10 meters in height. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Additionally, it has been used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including fever reduction and skin problems, often in the form of decoctions or infusions.
